# N1KO-STATE v1.0.18

This release completes the performance/native-UI foundation and integrates the Agent Center plus a source-level Ping Island migration into N1KO-STATE's single application architecture.

## Highlights

- Added N1KO-owned Agent sessions for Claude, Codex, Gemini, Qwen, Qoder, Kimi, OpenCode, Hermes and other audited clients.
- Migrated Ping Island's compact notch, hover/click expansion, session list/detail, questions, completion state, mascots, detachment and sound-pack settings behind N1KO-owned adapters.
- Bundled the 13 approved upstream sound assets with pinned hashes and complete Apache-2.0 LICENSE/NOTICE attribution.
- Added native Claude launch/input/termination through a private pseudo-terminal and authenticated Codex app-server launch/follow-up/archive through an owned stdio channel.
- Added exact public process-tree/tmux focus suppression and Qoder CN desktop/CLI compatibility from Ping Island v0.26.0.
- Kept the persistent Island out of native fullscreen Spaces on notchless displays; only the separate public-API reveal panel can appear after deliberate top-edge intent.
- Reworked monitor publication, bounded history, sampling lifecycle, Quick Panel and settings while preserving alerts, fan control and thermal-safety behavior.
- Added redacted local diagnostics, migration rollback, identity/license/private-API gates and isolated performance/soak tooling.

## Verification

- 138 automated tests passed; three live-environment gates were skipped explicitly, while the installed Codex app-server acceptance ran and passed.
- Native Release build, smoke test, localization/plist lint, identity, ownership, license, sound hash, macOS 12 minimum, strict signature and private-API gates passed.
- Final 30-second isolated calibrations passed: monitoring-only 0.091% awake CPU / 1.57 wakeups/s; Agent Core with 200 sessions 0.086% / 1.41 wakeups/s, with no growing thread, FD, socket or Agent-resource counts.

The two 24-hour soak runs and cross-hardware/manual accessibility/fullscreen matrices are not claimed by this release; see the repository roadmap for the exact evidence boundary.

---

本版本完成性能/原生 UI 基础重构，并把 Agent Center 与同源迁移的 Ping Island 交互整合进 N1KO-STATE 的单一应用架构。

- 支持 Claude、Codex、Gemini、Qwen、Qoder、Kimi、OpenCode、Hermes 等客户端与会话。
- 接入紧凑岛、悬停/点击展开、会话列表/详情、提问、完成、宠物、拖拽分离和音效包设置。
- 支持 N1KO 自有 Claude 原生会话与 Codex 认证 stdio app-server 双向操作。
- 同步 Ping Island v0.26.0 的 Qoder CN 桌面版/CLI 能力，并补齐进程树/tmux 聚焦抑制。
- 保留无刘海屏公共 API 双窗口全屏修复，不使用私有 WindowServer API。
- 138 项自动化测试通过；完整原生构建与发布门禁通过。

**Full changelog:** [v1.0.18 tag](https://github.com/baogutang/N1KO-STATE/releases/tag/v1.0.18)
